title: Eat an Omelette
description: Simple and easy, you can now cook eggs to obtain omelets!
body:
![EAT AN OMELETTE BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VqI5EAmI/images/97f8f0019e9b00641ff2c675847d578305a67acc.webp) Simple and easy, you can now cook eggs to obtain omelets! Currently, Eat an Omelette adds three food items: - Omelette: grants two food thighs. - Golden Omelette: grants four food thighs. - Spanish Potato Omelette: it is similar to a cake ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![EAT AN OMELETTE SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VqI5EAmI/images/fe3ec78804e3b430d3478b68600dcc16411f38a1.webp) Basically, the goal of this mod is to expand the power possibilities of the games. Adding both French omelettes and Spanish potato omelettes. Both foods can be obtained easily, and by making use of other predetermined elements of the "vanilla" games, such as the chickens' own eggs. ![EAT AN OMELETTE F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VqI5EAmI/images/bc97d03b89cf99615ac5aeb90b20af018ae0f6df.webp) ### Is it compatible with other food mods? Unless you add some food that requires cooking lasa ggallinas eggs for its preparation, this mod is perfectly compatible. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![EAT AN OMELETTE SCREENSHOTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VqI5EAmI/images/cd2ff79282f6602d4f607096cae58543448e9222.webp) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
